_status: Fine-tuning in progress from P4-A best.pt
motivation: Condition the DiT on a prompt embedding to steer what kind of text comes out. E.g., conditioning on 'red team TTP' vs 'defensive playbook' prompt embeddings to generate domain-targeted text.

architecture_changes.conditioning: cond_embed added to timestep conditioning c: c = time_embed(t) + cond_proj(mean_pool_tokens)
architecture_changes.null_condition: zeros (B, 1536) tensor — model learns to generate without conditioning

base_model.loaded_params: all except cond_proj.* (new CFG layers initialized fresh)

inference_command: # After training, use generate.py with cfg_scale > 1.0 and a prompt embedding
prompt_encoding: mean-pool Qwen token embeddings over the prompt → (1, 1536) conditioning vector
